mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 5.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit margins and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment, or the correlation between UNRATE and returns falls below -0.2 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and declines in the federal funds rate signal stagflationary pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >50% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 235 and FEDFUNDS < 0.2%, or the interaction term between CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS shows no significant impact on returns.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) signals weakening supply-side capacity, reducing corporate earnings and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >50% of triggered instances despite declining INDPRO, or the correlation between INDPRO and returns falls below -0.15 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) signals strong labor market demand, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in >50% of instances with rising PAYEMS, or the correlation between PAYEMS and returns falls below 0.1 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in housing starts (HOUST) above 1,200 thousand units signals strong demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in >50% of triggered instances despite rising HOUST, or the correlation between HOUST and returns falls below 0.1 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signal robust economic growth, driving corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in >50% of instances where GDPC1 > 16300 and INDPRO > 106.0, or the interaction term between GDPC1 and INDPRO shows no significant impact on returns.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle, increasing borrowing costs and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >50% of triggered instances despite rising FEDFUNDS, or the correlation between FEDFUNDS and returns falls below -0.15 in rolling 1-year windows.
